flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Georgia Northwestern Technical College rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.8k → $6.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Georgia Northwestern Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Georgia Northwestern Technical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (56.2% → 62.3%).
